scenarios.description: search(term not in index) returns empty list (branch B0 false)
scenarios.precondition: new BM25InvertedIndex with no movies added
pseudocode: THEN the result list is empty

scenarios.description: search(term with empty posting list) returns empty list (branch B0 true, loop-0)
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex instanced; via reflection inject index.put("foo", new HashMap<>());
pseudocode: GIVEN a BM25InvertedIndex with index["foo"] = empty map (injected via reflection)
THEN the result list is empty

scenarios.description: search(term with posting entry but missing movie) skips entry (B3 false)
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex instanced; via reflection inject index.put("bar", map containing entry docId=1→freq=2); movies map remains empty
pseudocode: GIVEN a BM25InvertedIndex with index["bar"] = {1=2} and no movies added
THEN the result list is empty

scenarios.description: search(single-term) returns single SearchResult (B3 true, loop-1)
scenarios.expectedResult: returned list contains one SearchResult with docId=1 and relevanceScore = computeBM25Score(2,3,idf) where idf = log((1-1+0.5)/(1+0.5))
pseudocode: GIVEN a BM25InvertedIndex with one movie containing term "alpha" twice
THEN result list size is 1 and result.get(0).getDocId() == 1

scenarios.description: search(term in two movies) returns two SearchResults sorted by descending score (loop-N)
scenarios.precondition: new BM25InvertedIndex; addMovie(1,"A",0.0,0,"x x x"); addMovie(2,"B",0.0,0,"x x");
scenarios.expectedResult: returned list contains SearchResult(docId=1) before SearchResult(docId=2)
pseudocode: GIVEN a BM25InvertedIndex with two movies: doc1 has term thrice, doc2 twice

scenarios.description: search(term case-insensitivity) matches uppercase input (B0 true, normalization)
scenarios.expectedResult: returned list contains one result with docId=1
pseudocode: GIVEN a BM25InvertedIndex with movie containing term "bone"
THEN result list size is 1 and result.get(0).getDocId() == 1
